_comment: Explicit choices for every divergence between the five per-app-type specs. 'pick' takes that spec's variant for all; 'content_from' (spec:kind/name) replaces content cross-name; 'rename_to' renames after content resolution; 'set_strings' patches JSON-pointer paths with per-language strings from overrides/strings.json; 'superset' calls a dedicated builder in merge_specs.py. Unlisted divergent components are namespaced per spec automatically (rendering-preserving).

POST /chat-messages.note: User decision 2026-07-03: single mode-aware page; chatflow responses are supersets of chat's; hand-merged SSE description in overrides/chat-messages-sse.{lang}.md

GET /workflow/{workflow_run_id}/events.note: User decision 2026-07-03: single mode-aware page; workflow's wording is mode-neutral; chatflow example added alongside

GET /info.note: example values only (mode/name); AppInfoResponse.mode description covers all modes

GET /parameters.note: response schemas unified to AppParametersResponse below; property sets verified identical

GET /end-users/{end_user_id}.note: zh-only summary drift (获取终端用户信息 vs 获取终端用户); en variants are identical

GET /workflows/run/{workflow_run_id}.note: merged param description covers both run-response and message-metadata sources

schemas/ChatRequest.note: chatflow's workflow_id gains a Chatflow-only note; response_mode keeps chat's Agent caveat

schemas/ChunkChatEvent.note: event enum and discriminator mapping are the union of chat (agent events) and chatflow (workflow/node events)

responses/SuccessResult.note: no enum on response fields per spec conventions; description states the constant

schemas/AppInfoResponse.note: mode description listing all app modes

schemas/ConversationRenameRequest.note: user is optional: FetchUserArg.required defaults to False (api/controllers/service_api/wraps.py:54-56 at 7a4252b3de); chatflow's required:[user] was wrong

schemas/InputFileObject.note: completion's anyOf enforces url XOR upload_file_id

schemas/StreamEventChatMessageFile.note: no enum on response fields per spec conventions

schemas/ChatAppParametersResponse.note: three per-app names, identical property sets, workflow's descriptions are the most complete
